purpose: Move V4.4 from web-card layout toward the new video's central task-selection interface.
layout_rules: central core occupies 60-72vw and 92-98vh on desktop
node labels become micro task tags, not wide white cards
each node group must be visually attached: ring -> short leader -> tiny image/tag
routes should be short radial branches from core/hub, not long web arcs
motion: node ring pulses once or gently loops
foreground image crop appears only after tag/frame
